title: Session 08 — To the Underdark
bodyText:
**TL;DR: Final errands turned up two S-marked corpses in Cumb's bag; Varen broke down at the Underdark entrance and his mark was revealed; inside, a botched distraction drew a grick and two giant spiders — roll initiative.**

# What happened
- Last errands: [[pc-brolin|Brolin]]'s delivery operation with **[[filbert]]**; [[cumb]]'s bag inventory turned up **two corpses with raw S-marks** cut into their arms.
- At [[the-underdark|the Underdark]] entrance **[[pc-varen|Varen]] broke down and refused** — his **mark was revealed** to the party in the struggle.
- They entered anyway, following Judy's vines, until a botched distraction revealed them to a **grick and two giant spiders**. Roll initiative.

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] Varen's mark — **revealed to the party** in the struggle at the entrance.
- The two corpses with **raw S-marks** cut into their arms.
- The grick and two giant spiders — fight underway (cliffhanger).

# Threads
[[the-underdark]] · [[cumb]] · [[filbert]] · [[pc-varen]]
